chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: There was a time when you were making a website for a client

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.text: But what I have come to tell you today is

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: That you can change styles

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: On the basis of which device you are on

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: See a little story I will tell you

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: I will tell you such a story

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: As grandfathers tell their grandchildren

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: That it used to happen in our time

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: See it used to happen

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: It was not in my time

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: When css2 came, a query named media was introduced and its purpose was only that the media query was telling that if any person is accessing the website on any other device, then styles can be changed.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: It was called media rule which was introduced in css2 and in css3, the name of this media rule was changed to media query.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So in css2, forget about how media rule works, let me tell you how media query works in css3.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So what is the syntax of media query in css3?

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: First of all, you write at the rate media.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: This means that you are writing a media query.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: After this, you tell which device you want to write the media query on.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: And before that, a not or only comes, that is, I can write media only screen here.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: That is, it is only on the screen, then it applies here.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So a typical syntax of media query looks like this.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: We write media not or only that either don't show on this media type or show only if this is the media type.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: And after that, we write some expressions here about which I will tell you and write css code in it which will be applied when this thing will be satisfied.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Okay, now I will tell you how you can use this.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So here the media is written, I will write in most of the cases we write only because we want this media query to match only when we are on the screen.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: When the media is on the screen.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: And what are the other media types?

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: You can put all, that is, on all media types.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Then you can put print, which is the printer etc.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: If the website is being viewed, then you will see it.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Another media type is the screen, which is the most common in the phone, laptop or in your iPad etc.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: If you are showing, then it is a screen.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: There is another speech device, which is used for those people who cannot see.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So speech is put here.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: If you want this css style to be applied only when there is a speech device here, then you will write speech here.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: But in most of the cases, you will only write the screen here.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: And after that you will write the end here.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: And you will write a condition something like this.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Suppose I write the max width should be 455 pixels.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: And suppose I want that if this happens, then the background color should be red of the body.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Okay.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So I will do one thing, I will write the body here.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: And I will write the background color blue in the body.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Okay.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: I will make the background color blue here.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So if the max width is 45 pixels, then the background color will be blue.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So I will show you what it means.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: I will make it small.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: I will make it small.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: I will make it small.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Look here it is showing the width.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: I will make it small.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: I will make it small.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: I will make it small.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Look here you people, if its max width here is 455 pixels, then this css style will be applied.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Meaning if it is smaller than 455, then this style will be applied.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: And if it is bigger than 455, then this style which is written inside it will not apply.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So media query works like this.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: And this is 90% media query.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: As much as I have told you till now.

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: in 90-95% of the cases.

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: it has also disappeared from here.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: That means there is no existence of this media query.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: These CSS styles will not be used anymore.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So this media query is not visible.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: As soon as I increase it,

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: it is saying that this media query is activated.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So these styles will not work.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: That's all about media query.

chunks.text: So to summarize,

chunks.text: So I hope you understood media queries.

chunks.text: Now, I will use media queries when we will make projects.

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: behind the hood,

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: like Tailwind CSS,

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: uses media queries behind the hood.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Bootstrap,

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: uses media queries behind the hood.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: But we will write raw CSS.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: What does portrait mean?

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: Portrait means that

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: our height,

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: this height,

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: this is portrait.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: This height is more than width.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: And if width is more than height,

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: then it is landscape.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So see, if it is landscape,

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: then this border is visible.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So you can also do orientation, landscape or portrait here.

chunks.title: 720p60

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So if I did portrait here,

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: then this will be visible in portrait.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: You can see that this border is visible only in portrait.

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: So if you want your styles to be enabled in landscape or portrait,

chunks.title: 720p60
chunks.text: then you can use this.

It was called media rule which was introduced in css2 and in css3, the name of this media rule was changed to media query. So in css2, forget about how media rule works, let me tell you how media query works in css3. So what is the syntax of media query in css3? First of all, you write at the rate media. When the media is on the screen. And what are the other media types? You can put all, that is, on all media types.
